brand.name: Life Story Memoir
brand.tagline: The true story of your life is the one you put into words.

expert.name: Richard Squires
expert.bio: Over the past eleven years, Richard has written more than 70 memoirs — spanning six continents, dozens of countries, and every walk of life imaginable.

product.name: Living Letter Challenge
product.hook: Write your memoir in 30 days — or Richard writes it with you.
product.audience: People going through estate planning who want their stories, values, and wishes preserved alongside their assets.
product.pain_point: Estate plans tell your family who gets what — but not who you were, what mattered, or the story behind the things they'll inherit.
product.promise: End the challenge with a Living Letter: the voice, wisdom, and stories your family will treasure long after you're gone.

visual.style: editorial serif — like a well-made book, not a startup

reviews.quote: My deepest gratitude to Richard Squires who gave life to my words and guided me through a wonderful journey. Richard helped me to write and publish my life story. I never thought writing a book about my life would be as seamless and enjoyable as he made it.
reviews.name: Victor G.
reviews.context: About his memoir — A Doctor from Brooklyn
